identity.description: Bring a concern, problem, topic, or prayer need and receive a relevant Bible verse, Bible.com link, faithful interpretation, practical next steps, and a short prayer grounded in Scripture.

inputs.description: User concern and preferred Bible version.

example.text: I feel anxious about the future and need peace.

text.title: User concern, problem, prayer, or topic

outputs.description: Bible verse, link, text, interpretation, advice, and prayer.

example.verse_content: do not be anxious about anything, but in everything by prayer and supplication with thanksgiving let your requests be made known to God.
example.verse_interpretation: Paul encourages believers to bring every worry to God in prayer rather than carrying anxiety alone.
example.advice:
- Set aside a few minutes today to name your fears before God in prayer.
- Write down one specific request you can thank God for while you wait.
- Ask a trusted friend to pray with you this week.
example.prayer: Lord, quiet my anxious heart and teach me to bring every concern to You in prayer. Help me trust Your peace that guards my mind. In Jesus name, Amen.

skills.name: Prayer Request
skills.description: Selects a relevant verse and returns interpretation, advice, and prayer.
examples: {"text":"I am struggling with anxiety about my job.","bible_version":"ESV"}
{"text":"My friend died and I am grieving.","bible_version":"ESV"}
{"text":"I am grateful for God's blessings this week.","bible_version":"ESV"}
